creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Auto-detection fails (MFX_HW_UNKNOWN) because libmfx.so wants to enumerate all Intel GPUs by reading /sys/class/drm/renderD*/device/device, limiting MFX to the legacy GPUs. On FreeBSD neither /sys is mounted by default nor supports render nodes. A proper fix would be to convert the code to libpciaccess or libpci but this is non-trivial, so let's revert to the old behavior for now. oneVPL hasn't been ported yet, anyway.

https://github.com/Intel-Media-SDK/MediaSDK/blob/intel-mediasdk-21.3.5/api/mfx_dispatch/linux/device_ids.h#L425
https://github.com/oneapi-src/oneVPL-intel-gpu requires Tiger Lake or newer.
